reviews.comment:
Combustibles nacionales.  Aunque las naftas lamentablemente lleven aumentando 8 veces en lo que va del año, hay q apostar a ypf nacional y popular . Atención por lo gral muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
Domestic fuels. Although gasoline prices have unfortunately increased eight times this year, it's worth choosing YPF, a national and popular station. The service is generally very good.

reviewer.displayName: BELEN FERRER E HIJOS Constructora e Inmobiliaria

reviews.comment:
Apenas llegas y si no pedís nada te piden q te vallas o sea no podés esperar a un amigo

(Translated by Google)
You barely arrive and if you don't ask for anything they ask you to leave, meaning you can't wait for a friend.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBak5UbGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amables, hasta para limpiar el parabrisas y revisión. Quizas el lugar donde está no es el mejor ya que muchos autos quedan parados esperando sobre la senda peatonal, o sobre H. Primo en doble cola. Tiene estacionamiento exclusivo.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly, even when cleaning the windshield and doing the inspection. Perhaps the location isn't the best, as many cars end up stopped waiting on the pedestrian walkway, or double-parked on H. Primo. It does have its own parking lot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncDRLM3N3RRAB
